name: IBOBS Claims Knowledge Cache Filesystem Pressure
programText:
A = data('system.filesystem.utilization', filter=filter('deployment.environment', '{{deployment_environment}}') and filter('service.instance.id', '{{instance}}') and filter('mountpoint', '{{cache_mountpoint}}')).max().publish(label='Cache Filesystem Utilization')
detect(when(A > {{filesystem_utilization_threshold}}, lasting='2m')).publish('Claims Knowledge Cache Filesystem Pressure')

rule.description: Out-of-the-box filesystem utilization is above the lab threshold for the claims knowledge cache mount.

name: IBOBS Claims Knowledge APM Latency
programText:
A = data('service.request.duration.ns', filter=filter('deployment.environment', '{{deployment_environment}}') and filter('service.instance.id', '{{instance}}') and filter('sf_service', 'claims-knowledge')).percentile(pct=95).publish(label='P95 Duration')
detect(when(A > {{apm_latency_threshold_ns}}, lasting='2m')).publish('Claims Knowledge APM Latency')

rule.description: Splunk APM service request duration is elevated for the claims-knowledge service.

name: IBOBS Claims Knowledge APM Error Rate
programText:
A = data('service.request', filter=filter('deployment.environment', '{{deployment_environment}}') and filter('service.instance.id', '{{instance}}') and filter('sf_service', 'claims-knowledge') and filter('sf_error', 'true')).count()
B = data('service.request', filter=filter('deployment.environment', '{{deployment_environment}}') and filter('service.instance.id', '{{instance}}') and filter('sf_service', 'claims-knowledge')).count()
C = (A / B).publish(label='Error Rate')
detect(when(C > {{apm_error_threshold}}, lasting='2m')).publish('Claims Knowledge APM Error Rate')

rule.description: Splunk APM service request error rate is elevated for the claims-knowledge service.
